scope: NaC repository-wide AI supply-chain baseline for plugins, workflows and usecases

metadata.name: NaC AI-SBOM baseline
metadata.release_binding: draft only until first AI-enabled release package

system_level_properties.description: Repository-wide governance and implementation baseline for Notariat as Code.

models.purpose: No production model is bound in this baseline draft.

security_properties.control: Repository privacy lint, secret scan and human review stay mandatory.
Regulated or notarial AI use requires documented review before external processing.

key_performance_indicators.metric: Every AI-enabled plugin, workflow and usecase has an AI-SBOM decision before release.
Every external AI processing path has AVV/DPA status documented.

open_tasks: Inventory all AI touchpoints in plugins, workflows, usecases and prompts.
Choose final machine-readable mapping to CycloneDX, SPDX or another approved AI-SBOM profile.
Add release binding so AI-SBOM artifacts are attached to tagged releases.
Define per-plugin and per-workflow AI-SBOM update responsibilities.
Add vulnerability and model-risk review hooks after the minimum element mapping is stable.
